name: Green Bean and Roasted Tomato Salad
recipeIngredient: 5 plum tomatoes, each cut lengthwise into 4 slices
1/4 pound haricots verts, or small green beans, trimmed
1/4 teaspoon fresh lemon juice, or to taste
1/4 teaspoon dijon mustard, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F. Lightly grease a baking sheet.
2. Arrange tomatoes in one layer on the baking sheet and season with salt and pepper.
3. Roast tomatoes in the middle of the oven for 15 minutes, or until edges are browned and cool.
4. While tomatoes are roasting, cook beans in salted boiling water for 3 minutes, or until crisp-tender. Drain beans in a colander and rinse under cold water until cool. Drain beans and pat dry.
5. In a bowl, whisk together juices, zest, mustard, oil, shallot, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Arrange tomatoes on 2 plates, overlapping them. Mound mixed baby salad greens and beans on top. Drizzle salads with vinaigrette. Serves 2 as a first course or side dish.
